title: Dont put strange things in there
display_title: Dont put strange things in there
wikitext:
[]: "Don't put strange things in there!"             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Tue Jul 02, 2013 11:06 pm I've never understood why, in episode #20 while Kaji and Misato are doing the deed, this line comes up. Obviously Kaji was giving Misato the chip with the secret intel but..... Why does the scene have to imply that he was trying to shove it up her vag, or asshole? It's a legitimate question: Why couldn't he have just simply given her the thing in a normal fashion? It just makes no sense to me.

[]: Re: "Don't put strange things in there!"             Quote Post by Jurrasic » Wed Jul 03, 2013 12:29 am Guy Nacks wrote: I've never understood why, in episode #20 while Kaji and Misato are doing the deed, this line comes up. Obviously Kaji was giving Misato the chip with the secret intel but..... Why does the scene have to imply that he was trying to shove it up her vag, or asshole? It's a legitimate question: Why couldn't he have just simply given her the thing in a normal fashion? It just makes no sense to me.

[]: Re: "Don't put strange things in there!"             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Wed Jul 03, 2013 12:41 am Jurrasic wrote: Cos it's Kaji being paranoid they are being spied on/filmed when together at all times? He gives it to her in a manner that means it can be taken out and examined in the bathroom alone later.

[]: Re: "Don't put strange things in there!"             Quote Post by Jurrasic » Wed Jul 03, 2013 1:23 am Guy Nacks wrote: But, if that's the case, it's an epic fail because she opens the damn thing right away and it's flat out addressed in the room. There's a ton of other covert ways he could've given her that thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Wed Jul 03, 2013 2:57 am Because Kaji is lewd and kinky.

[]: Re: "Don't put strange things in there!"             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed Jul 03, 2013 7:29 am Guy Nacks wrote: I've never understood why, in episode #20 while Kaji and Misato are doing the deed, this line comes up. Obviously Kaji was giving Misato the chip with the secret intel but.....

[]: Re: "Don't put strange things in there!"             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jul 03, 2013 7:35 am Shinoyami65 wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: "Don't put strange things in there!"             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed Jul 03, 2013 7:43 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Those are some very feminine fingernails he's got.

[]: Re: "Don't put strange things in there!"             Quote Post by Jurrasic » Wed Jul 03, 2013 11:59 am Shinoyami65 wrote: Hmm, watching the scene again it does seem like Misato thought he was going to use it for that purpose, and took it from him.

[]: Re: "Don't put strange things in there!"             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jul 03, 2013 2:05 pm Shinoyami65 wrote: Hmm, watching the scene again it does seem like Misato thought he was going to use it for that purpose, and took it from him.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Jul 03, 2013 6:51 pm I believe the implication of Kaji's action is that the information he is giving Misato is of the absolute highest import and should be kept as secure as humanly possible. We later learn, via Misato's midnight car soliloquy in EoE, that the chip in the pill contains information on Seele's plans for Third Impact EoE #25' wrote: Misato: Having reached its limit as a colony of flawed and separate entities, Humankind is to be artificially evolved into a perfect single being. The Instrumentality Project... An ideal world... And to achieve this the Committee plans to use not Adam or NERV, but Eva. Just like Kaji predicted.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jul 03, 2013 7:25 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Misato probably does keep the pill stored in wherever Kaji was trying to put it for the next two and a half episodes. (Those more anatomically learned that the rest of us will have to elaborate on which, if any, orifices are feasible candidates)

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Jul 03, 2013 7:42 pm Doesn't strike you as kinda cool? Stuff your secret information into your contact person's girl cavity! But obviously, that was one of these ideas/fantasies that sound better in your head XD ...but he probably just tried it for fun, it's already disguised as a capsule, so...

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jul 03, 2013 9:03 pm Great. Now I have the image of Kaji raining classified documents on Misato's head, one folder after another, and referring to this as 'spy bukaki'.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Thu Jul 04, 2013 3:22 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: There are two conclusions we can draw here: a) Misato probably does keep the pill stored in wherever Kaji was trying to put it for the next two and a half episodes. (Those more anatomically learned that the rest of us will have to elaborate on which, if any, orifices are feasible candidates)

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Jul 04, 2013 4:55 am ....yeah, the impression I got was that she more or less forgot about the silly thing, and then much later, somewhere during the whole grieving process, she remembered it and drew the conclusion that there might be some clues hidden in there.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sun Jul 07, 2013 3:51 am We officially all now know that Misato's snatch either is tight enough to hold a tiny pill for sustained lengths of time. OR She had a tiny pill shoved up her pooper and had to poop it out after a sustained length of time.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Jul 07, 2013 10:38 am With such a small thing, I'd be worried that it might get lost somewhere.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Sun Jul 07, 2013 11:58 am I'm so honestly tempted to make detailed scatologic comment for the sake of disgusting averyone, but I'll restrain myself.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Jul 07, 2013 12:50 pm ^Do humor us.
